US President may not attend 2025 Quad meet - Report</title><description><![CDATA[US President Donald Trump's planned visit to India for the Quad Summit is off, signaling a deterioration in his relationship with Narendra Modi. The souring ties stem from Trump's repeated, and disputed, claims of resolving the India-Pakistan conflict, coupled with Modi's refusal to endorse Trump for the Nobel Peace Prize.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/donald-trump-to-skip-india-visit-us-president-may-not-attend-2025-quad-meet-report/articleshow/123604312.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/donald-trump-to-skip-india-visit-us-president-may-not-attend-2025-quad-meet-report/articleshow/123604312.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 20:57:27 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1399951" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123604269,imgsize-1399951.cms"/></item><item><title>'Don’t talk nonsense': Tej Pratap slams 'abki baar Tejashwi sarkar' chant; calls out 'ego'</title><description><![CDATA[Tej Pratap Yadav, recently ousted from his family and party, criticized egoism in leadership during a Jehanabad gathering, distancing himself from chants of "Abki Baar Tejashwi Sarkar." He emphasized that government formation relies on the people, not individuals, cautioning against arrogance. Lalu Prasad Yadav expelled Tej Pratap for six years due to disregard for moral values and irresponsible behavior.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/dont-talk-nonsense-tej-pratap-slams-abki-baar-tejashwi-sarkar-chant-calls-out-ego/articleshow/123605059.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/dont-talk-nonsense-tej-pratap-slams-abki-baar-tejashwi-sarkar-chant-calls-out-ego/articleshow/123605059.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 22:29:15 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1203274" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123605146,imgsize-1203274.cms"/></item><item><title>US embassy to visa applicants in India: This passport service has been discontinued</title><description><![CDATA[Starting August 1, 2025, the US will discontinue third-party passport collection services for visa applicants. Individuals can collect their passports in person or opt for home delivery at a fee of Rs 1,200. For applicants under 18, a parent or guardian must collect the passport with an original consent letter from both parents and required identification.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/us-embassy-to-visa-applicants-in-india-starting-august-this-passport-service-has-been-discontinued/articleshow/123600229.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/us-embassy-to-visa-applicants-in-india-starting-august-this-passport-service-has-been-discontinued/articleshow/123600229.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 15:29:27 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="2535548" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123600269,imgsize-2535548.cms"/></item><item><title>'I want my Porsche': Yuvraj Singh’s six-sixes bat now with Lalit Modi – here’s why</title><description><![CDATA[Lalit Modi, the IPL's founder, pledged a Porsche to any Indian cricketer hitting six sixes or taking six wickets in an over during the 2007 T20 World Cup. Yuvraj Singh famously achieved this feat against Stuart Broad, prompting Modi to fulfill his promise. Yuvraj received his Porsche, and Modi acquired the iconic bat, a cherished memento of that historic moment.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/i-want-my-porsche-yuvraj-singhs-six-sixes-bat-now-with-lalit-modi-heres-why/articleshow/123604691.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/i-want-my-porsche-yuvraj-singhs-six-sixes-bat-now-with-lalit-modi-heres-why/articleshow/123604691.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 22:14:33 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="46650" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123605005,imgsize-46650.cms"/></item><item><title>India’s urban families face 9x higher school expenses than rural households</title><description><![CDATA[A recent survey reveals a significant disparity in education costs across India. Urban families spend considerably more on private schooling than rural families on government education. Tuition fees and coaching classes contribute to this divide. Families bear most of the financial burden. This highlights inequities in the education system.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/indias-education-spending-divide-urban-families-face-nine-times-higher-school-expenses-than-rural-households/articleshow/123604685.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/indias-education-spending-divide-urban-families-face-nine-times-higher-school-expenses-than-rural-households/articleshow/123604685.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 21:34:47 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>LAKSHIMA SAREEN</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="212705" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123604711,imgsize-212705.cms"/></item><item><title>'False & baseless': PIB busts Pakistan claim of India's S-400 hit; clarifies image origin</title><description><![CDATA[The Press Information Bureau (PIB) has refuted Pakistan's propaganda claiming India's S-400 air defence system was damaged during Operation Sindoor. PIB clarified that reports of destruction are false, and the circulated image is from a 2010 Russian parade. India launched Operation Sindoor after the Pahalgam terror attack, striking terror hubs, and intercepted Pakistani drones and missiles using the S-400.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/false-baseless-pib-busts-pakistan-claim-of-indias-s-400-hit-clarifies-image-origin/articleshow/123603831.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/false-baseless-pib-busts-pakistan-claim-of-indias-s-400-hit-clarifies-image-origin/articleshow/123603831.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 20:04:27 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1154127" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123603840,imgsize-1154127.cms"/></item><item><title>Tesla loses verdict it plans to appeal, says lawyers misled jury on Musk</title><description><![CDATA[Tesla is contesting a $243 million verdict in a fatal Autopilot crash case, alleging that the opposing lawyers misled the jury by focusing on Elon Musk and irrelevant evidence. The company argues that the verdict could stifle innovation and harm road safety. Tesla maintains its technology wasn't responsible, while plaintiffs contend the 'Autopilot' name was misleading.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/tesla-loses-the-court-case-that-carmakers-across-the-world-have-been-closely-watching-to-appeal-the-verdict-claim-lawyers-misled-jury-on-elon-musk/articleshow/123601994.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/tesla-loses-the-court-case-that-carmakers-across-the-world-have-been-closely-watching-to-appeal-the-verdict-claim-lawyers-misled-jury-on-elon-musk/articleshow/123601994.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 17:20:39 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="65702" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123601988,imgsize-65702.cms"/></item><item><title>50 gold medals! India create history in Asian Shooting Championship</title><description><![CDATA[India made history at the 16th Asian Shooting Championship in Shymkent, Kazakhstan, securing a leading 50 gold medals. The senior team excelled in Olympic events, earning six gold, two silver, and three bronze medals, only behind China. Junior shooters also shone, contributing significantly to India's total of 99 medals, surpassing Kazakhstan and China in the overall standings.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/more-sports/shooting/50-gold-medals-india-create-history-with-best-ever-showing-in-asian-shooting-championship/articleshow/123604195.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/more-sports/shooting/50-gold-medals-india-create-history-with-best-ever-showing-in-asian-shooting-championship/articleshow/123604195.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 21:21:37 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="283956" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123604585,imgsize-283956.cms"/></item><item><title>Dhankhar applies for pension; seeks MLA benefits - why was it stopped in 2019</title><description><![CDATA[Jagdeep Dhankhar, after resigning as Vice President citing health issues, has applied to resume his pension as a former legislator in Rajasthan. He previously received this pension until becoming the governor of West Bengal in 2019. Now 74, Dhankhar is entitled to a monthly pension of Rs 42,000, with the Rajasthan Assembly secretariat processing his application following his resignation.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/jagdeep-dhankhar-applies-for-pension-claims-mla-benefits-in-rajasthan-why-it-was-stopped-in-2019/articleshow/123603370.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/jagdeep-dhankhar-applies-for-pension-claims-mla-benefits-in-rajasthan-why-it-was-stopped-in-2019/articleshow/123603370.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 19:41:29 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="65240" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123603503,imgsize-65240.cms"/></item><item><title>'Stick with devil you know': Late Queen Elizabeth II opposed Brexit</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/uk/stick-with-devil-you-know-late-queen-elizabeth-ii-opposed-brexit-new-book-reveals/articleshow/123604675.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/uk/stick-with-devil-you-know-late-queen-elizabeth-ii-opposed-brexit-new-book-reveals/articleshow/123604675.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 21:38:30 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="504095" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123604739,imgsize-504095.cms"/></item><item><title>Tesla bull on Nvidia CEO: Jensen is 10% politician; shares take on company stock</title><description><![CDATA[Tesla investor Dan Ives praises Nvidia's CEO Jensen Huang. Ives addresses geopolitical risks between the US and China. Nvidia aims to sell Blackwell chips in China. The company is willing to meet US government terms. Ives is optimistic about Nvidia's future. He predicts Nvidia's market value could reach $5 trillion by early 2026. He now favors Nvidia over Palantir stock.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/nvidia-ceo-jensen-huang-is-10-politician-and-90-ceo-tesla-bull-dan-ives-says/articleshow/123593080.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/nvidia-ceo-jensen-huang-is-10-politician-and-90-ceo-tesla-bull-dan-ives-says/articleshow/123593080.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 04:42:58 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="19028" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123593077,imgsize-19028.cms"/></item><item><title>'Photo-op, Truth posts': Why PM Modi avoided Trump’s calls, Washington invite</title><description><![CDATA[The last officially acknowledged phone call between PM Modi and Trump took place on June 17, when Trump left the G7 Summit in Canada abruptly and flew back to Washington. A bilateral meeting between the two leaders, planned on the sidelines of the summit, had to be cancelled. During that call, Trump invited PM Modi to stop over in Washington. ]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/photo-op-truth-posts-why-pm-modi-avoided-donald-trumps-calls-washington-invite-report-reveals/articleshow/123602343.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/photo-op-truth-posts-why-pm-modi-avoided-donald-trumps-calls-washington-invite-report-reveals/articleshow/123602343.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 18:59:26 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1192069" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123603090,imgsize-1192069.cms"/></item><item><title>Trump tariff: Ministry drafts multi-tier plan to shield Indian exporters</title><description><![CDATA[The Commerce Ministry of India is developing a strategy. This strategy aims to support Indian exporters facing new US tariffs. The plan includes easing liquidity and offering flexibility to SEZ units. It also promotes import substitution. E-commerce export hubs will be operationalised. The government will focus on financial and non-financial support.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/india-business/trump-tariff-ministry-drafts-multi-tier-plan-to-shield-indian-exporters-check-key-measures-outlined/articleshow/123602269.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/india-business/trump-tariff-ministry-drafts-multi-tier-plan-to-shield-indian-exporters-check-key-measures-outlined/articleshow/123602269.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 17:42:20 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI BUSINESS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="64814" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123602834,imgsize-64814.cms"/></item><item><title>'Less than 50 weapons': IAF on Op Sindoor; reveals why Pak asked for ceasefire</title><description><![CDATA[Air Marshal Narmdeshwar Tiwari recounted Operation Sindoor, revealing that fewer than 50 weapons strikes by the IAF on Pakistani military targets compelled Islamabad to request a ceasefire by May 10. These precision strikes, some hitting targets untouched even in the 1971 war, demonstrated India's air dominance and strategic planning, effectively conveying a strong message while minimizing collateral damage.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/less-than-50-weapons-to-end-conflict-iaf-on-op-sindoor-details-why-pak-asked-for-ceasefire/articleshow/123600869.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/less-than-50-weapons-to-end-conflict-iaf-on-op-sindoor-details-why-pak-asked-for-ceasefire/articleshow/123600869.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 16:28:02 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="19856" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123601904,imgsize-19856.cms"/></item><item><title>Israeli airstrike kills Houthi rebel PM Ahmed al-Rahawi in Sanaa</title><description><![CDATA[Israeli airstrikes in Sanaa, Yemen, resulted in the death of Ahmed al-Rahawi, the Houthi prime minister, along with several ministers during a government workshop. The Israeli military confirmed targeting a Houthi site, amidst ongoing Houthi attacks on Israel and Red Sea shipping in support of Palestinians. Earlier strikes this week in Sanaa caused numerous casualties, escalating tensions in the region.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/middle-east/israel-yemen-war-houthi-rebel-pm-ahmed-al-rahawi-killed-in-sanaa-israeli-military-confirms/articleshow/123603880.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/middle-east/israel-yemen-war-houthi-rebel-pm-ahmed-al-rahawi-killed-in-sanaa-israeli-military-confirms/articleshow/123603880.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 20:19:31 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="41488" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123603922,imgsize-41488.cms"/></item><item><title>'Agile & lethal': 'Bhairav' commandos to strengthen Army; first unit being raised</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/bhairav-commandos-to-add-muscle-to-army-by-october-31/articleshow/123592968.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/bhairav-commandos-to-add-muscle-to-army-by-october-31/articleshow/123592968.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 04:22:08 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>RAJAT PANDIT</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="51152" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123592988,imgsize-51152.cms"/></item><item><title>Watch: Pilot rescued in 30 seconds after dramatic plane crash off Oak Island</title><description><![CDATA[A pilot, Mark Finkelstein, miraculously survived a plane crash off Oak Island, North Carolina, after his engine failed mid-air. He was rescued within 30 seconds by the Oak Island Water Rescue team after the plane flipped upside down upon impact.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/oh-my-god-pilot-rescued-in-30-seconds-after-dramatic-plane-crash-off-oak-island-watch/articleshow/123603048.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/oh-my-god-pilot-rescued-in-30-seconds-after-dramatic-plane-crash-off-oak-island-watch/articleshow/123603048.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 20:05:33 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="20240" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123603857,imgsize-20240.cms"/></item><item><title>PM Modi in China: Meet with Xi, Putin lined up amid Trump tariff strain - list of SCO attendees</title><description><![CDATA[Tianjin is preparing to host the SCO Summit, with President Xi Jinping welcoming leaders including PM Modi and President Putin. Against a backdrop of global tensions heightened by US tariffs, the summit aims to project China as a stabilizing force and foster unity among the Global South. Discussions will likely encompass counterterrorism, trade, and a multipolar world order.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/sco-summit-chinas-xi-jinping-to-host-pm-modi-putin-amid-trump-tariff-strain-whos-attending/articleshow/123601598.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/sco-summit-chinas-xi-jinping-to-host-pm-modi-putin-amid-trump-tariff-strain-whos-attending/articleshow/123601598.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 17:16:16 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1005072" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123601921,imgsize-1005072.cms"/></item><item><title>Makhachev’s coach: From Syko Stu’s provocation to Rampage Jackson’s son clash</title><description><![CDATA[Javier Mendez, Islam Makhachev's coach, addressed the Raja Jackson-Syko Stu Smith incident, suggesting provocation from Smith and instigation from other wrestlers. Mendez argued that KnokX Pro Wrestling organizers were also at fault for placing an untrained MMA fighter, Raja Jackson, in an unscripted wrestling match without proper guidance. The incident, involving serious injuries to Smith, is currently under police investigation.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/international-sports/they-wanted-the-publicity-islam-makhachevs-coach-claims-syko-stu-provoked-rampage-jacksons-son-raja-jackson-during-violent-knokx-pro-wrestling-assault/articleshow/123604252.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/international-sports/they-wanted-the-publicity-islam-makhachevs-coach-claims-syko-stu-provoked-rampage-jacksons-son-raja-jackson-during-violent-knokx-pro-wrestling-assault/articleshow/123604252.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 20:53:25 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>SUMIT ROY</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="971612" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123604231,imgsize-971612.cms"/></item><item><title>Yellow brick road’ under Pacific: Volcanic rock revealed; deep sea mystery inspires awe</title><description><![CDATA[Deep in the Pacific, researchers aboard the E/V Nautilus discovered a peculiar, yellow brick road-like structure at nearly 3,000 meters. Initially sparking Atlantis comparisons, the formation is actually a hyaloclastite, shaped by ancient volcanic activity. This finding highlights the vast unknown of the deep sea and offers insights into the Pacific Ocean floor's volcanic history and Earth's crust evolution.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/science/scientists-find-yellow-brick-road-deep-beneath-the-pacific-ocean-the-surprising-truth-about-its-construction/articleshow/123603554.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/science/scientists-find-yellow-brick-road-deep-beneath-the-pacific-ocean-the-surprising-truth-about-its-construction/articleshow/123603554.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 19:42:07 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SCIENCE DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="68990" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123603539,imgsize-68990.cms"/></item><item><title>George Pickens reacts: "It was good for me" — Micah Parsons traded to Green Bay Packers</title><description><![CDATA[In a stunning NFL trade, the Dallas Cowboys sent star edge rusher Micah Parsons to the Green Bay Packers for two first-round picks and Kenny Clark. Parsons promptly signed a record-breaking $188 million extension with Green Bay, becoming the highest-paid non-quarterback.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/it-was-good-for-me-because-dallas-cowboys-wr-george-pickens-reacts-to-micah-parsons-trade-to-green-bay-packers/articleshow/123604259.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/it-was-good-for-me-because-dallas-cowboys-wr-george-pickens-reacts-to-micah-parsons-trade-to-green-bay-packers/articleshow/123604259.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 21:10:04 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GLOBAL SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="94226" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123604455,imgsize-94226.cms"/></item><item><title>Will Pakistan travel to India for Jr Men's WC 2025? Hockey India reveals</title><description><![CDATA[Pakistan's junior hockey team will participate in the FIH Junior Men's Hockey World Cup 2025 in Tamil Nadu. Chinese students often pursue funded PhDs or return home, facing less disruption. The shift may prompt Indian students to consider alternative destinations like the UK, Germany, and Australia.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/indian-students-may-flee-us-colleges-heres-why-tighter-visa-rules-are-forcing-a-rethink/articleshow/123598757.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/indian-students-may-flee-us-colleges-heres-why-tighter-visa-rules-are-forcing-a-rethink/articleshow/123598757.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 17:30:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>SANJAY SHARMA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="77322" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123599032,imgsize-77322.cms"/></item><item><title>Patrick & Brittany Mahomes: Motherhood’s emotional toll on NFL star’s wife</title><description><![CDATA[Brittany Mahomes, wife of Patrick Mahomes and mother of three, recently shared her experiences with the challenges of motherhood. Pandit, despite leading KKR to a title in 2024, exits after a challenging 2025 season, with Abhishek Nayar returning as assistant coach.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/ipl/top-stories/rahul-dravid-chandrakant-pandit-and-more-full-list-of-coach-player-changes-since-ipl-2025/articleshow/123599821.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/ipl/top-stories/rahul-dravid-chandrakant-pandit-and-more-full-list-of-coach-player-changes-since-ipl-2025/articleshow/123599821.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 15:33:16 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="72932" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123600304,imgsize-72932.cms"/></item><item><title>'Trump is Dead' trends on X: Vance's remark over US president sparks frenzy</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/trump-is-dead-trends-on-x-j-d-vances-remark-over-us-president-sparks-frenzy-simpsons-prediction-adds-fuel/articleshow/123598551.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/trump-is-dead-trends-on-x-j-d-vances-remark-over-us-president-sparks-frenzy-simpsons-prediction-adds-fuel/articleshow/123598551.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 15:05:23 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="907869" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123599775,imgsize-907869.cms"/></item><item><title>Panic at petrol pump: Staff shot for refusing fuel to helmetless youths in MP</title><description><![CDATA[In Bhind district, Madhya Pradesh, a petrol pump worker was shot and injured for refusing to serve fuel to two helmetless youths, adhering to district rules. The enraged youths returned with firearms, and one opened fire, injuring the worker. Police have identified the accused from CCTV footage and eyewitness accounts and are pursuing their arrest.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/bhopal/panic-in-petrol-pump-staff-shot-for-refusing-fuel-to-helmetless-youths-in-madhya-pradesh/articleshow/123598895.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/bhopal/panic-in-petrol-pump-staff-shot-for-refusing-fuel-to-helmetless-youths-in-madhya-pradesh/articleshow/123598895.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 13:52:28 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>P NAVEEN</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="53824" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123598959,imgsize-53824.cms"/></item><item><title>Maratha quota stir: Traffic comes to standstill in Mumbai — Top developments</title><description><![CDATA[Manoj Jarange's hunger strike in Mumbai intensifies, demanding a 10% Maratha quota under the OBC category without reducing existing OBC reservations. Jarange warns the government against testing the community's patience, accusing them of misinformation. Traffic in South Mumbai is disrupted as protesters gather, coinciding with the Ganesh festival.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/mumbai/maratha-quota-stir-enters-day-2-manoj-jarange-warns-govt-not-to-test-patience-traffic-comes-to-standstill-in-south-mumbai-top-developments/articleshow/123599425.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/mumbai/maratha-quota-stir-enters-day-2-manoj-jarange-warns-govt-not-to-test-patience-traffic-comes-to-standstill-in-south-mumbai-top-developments/articleshow/123599425.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 30 Aug 2025 14:45:16 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI CITY DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="137978" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123599528,imgsize-137978.cms"/></item></channel></rss>

    <item>
      <title><![CDATA[IKEA’s new ‘barn’ format may reshape retail in India with 100-store rollout]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/ikea-lada-retail-format-pilot-convenience-home-accessories-19656325.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[IKEA is testing a new retail format called barn format, a smaller, leaner store concept designed to make the brand more accessible. Ranging from 2,500 to 10,000 sq meters, barn stores offer a limited selection of furniture and home accessories, with most items available via next-day delivery, and a simplified food menu. According to Tolga Öncü, Head of Retail at Ingka Group, the goal is to extend IKEA’s reach into neighborhoods without cannibalizing existing stores. Pilots are currently running in the UK, Poland, and Texas, with a final rollout plan expected by the end of 2025. In India, barn could enable IKEA to scale rapidly, potentially launching 100 stores in the first year and transforming the brand into a mass-market player.]]></description>
      <pubDate><![CDATA[Thu, 21 Aug 2025 18:21:19 +0530]]></pubDate>
      <dc:creator>Swapnil Deshpande</dc:creator>
      <guid><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/ikea-lada-retail-format-pilot-convenience-home-accessories-19656325.htm]]></guid>

    </item>

      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/startup/1kosmos-series-b-funding-passwordless-identity-ai-blockchain-19655607.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[New Jersey-based identity verification platform 1Kosmos has raised $57 million in Series B funding to scale globally and strengthen its fight against impersonation attacks. The platform combines blockchain-based identity storage with AI-powered verification, aiming to create a decentralised, passwordless future. “Passwords are becoming obsolete and are no longer a viable form of authentication. We are at the forefront of this change and transformation,” said Founder and CEO Hemen Vimadalal.]]></description>

      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/economy/us-tariffs-impact-india-exporters-logistics-challenges-19655523.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[India’s exporters are rushing to beat the August 27 US tariff deadline, with companies frontloading shipments and exploring costly alternatives. Sudhir Sekhri of AEPC warned of potential $11.5 billion losses and layoffs, citing pressure on logistics and shortened US customs timelines. Meanwhile, energy imports continue steadily, with Sumit Ritolia of Kpler noting 1.71–1.8 million barrels per day of Russian crude already unloaded, while US crude supplies remain limited.
